With new elevators, a newly restored lobby, and the facade renovated to its original 1920s appearance, 833 S. Spring is looking to attract upscale apparel and marketing companies looking to position themselves within the rapidly evolving Los Angeles fashion district.. The building is surrounded by three major parking lots, and is widely known as an area landmark. On-site subterranean parking is also available.” Location Description: The Fashion District in Downtown Los Angeles is the West Coast hub of fashion industry. 833 S. Spring is situated within one block of the intersection of 9th Street & Los Angeles Street - just steps from The New Mart, California Mart, Gerry Building and Cooper Building. The Fashion District, having undergone an amazing facelift over the past few years, attracts the most prominent players in the fashion industry, as well as tens of thousands of visitors weekly

property_description: From its beautiful location to its dedicated labor force, the City of Simi Valley is committed to being the most desirable place for business. Businesses from all over have discovered the benefits of locating in a community which is "so close and yet so far" - close to Los Angeles for the amenities of a big city - far enough away to enjoy the peace, security and quality of country living. Simi Valley also offers the advantage of lower County, business and utility taxes, as well as a City government that encourages businesses to prosper. Just minutes to the east are the San Diego (405) and Golden State (5) Freeways. The Ronald Reagan/Simi Valley-San Fernando Valley (118) Freeway creates the arterial spine of Simi Valley. To the west, the Moorpark (23) Freeway connects with U.S. 101 to Northern and Southern California.
